## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Styling / UI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in the diff
- [ ] New environment variables documented (if applicable)
- [ ] API changes reflected in `docs/api-reference.md` (if applicable)
- [ ] Server-only keys (`SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `CLERK_SECRET_KEY`) not imported in client components

- [ ] Assessment scoring or questions changed
